'''zazara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yaird|yaird]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yaird|yaird]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zazara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæzæræth|zæzæræth]] || [[word:zæzæræj|zæzæræj]] || [[word:zæzæræsh|zæzæræsh]] || [[word:zæzæræ|zæzæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zazazarath|zazazarath]] || [[word:zazazaraj|zazazaraj]] || [[word:zazazarash|zazazarash]] || [[word:zazazara|zazazara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zazarath|zazarath]] || [[word:zazaraj|zazaraj]] || [[word:zazarash|zazarash]] || [[word:zazara|zazara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zazafrath|zazafrath]] || [[word:zazafraj|zazafraj]] || [[word:zazafrash|zazafrash]] || [[word:zazafraf|zazafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zazaratha|zazaratha]] || [[word:zazaraja|zazaraja]] || [[word:zazarasha|zazarasha]] || [[word:zazaraka|zazaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zazarath|zazarath]] || [[word:zazaraj|zazaraj]] || [[word:zazarash|zazarash]] || [[word:zazara|zazara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zazarathal|zazarathal]] || [[word:zazarajal|zazarajal]] || [[word:zazarashal|zazarashal]] || [[word:zazarakal|zazarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zazarathatha|zazarathatha]] || [[word:zazarajaja|zazarajaja]] || [[word:zazarashasha|zazarashasha]] || [[word:zazaraka|zazaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zazarathan|zazarathan]] || [[word:zazarajan|zazarajan]] || [[word:zazarashan|zazarashan]] || [[word:zazarakan|zazarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zazarathaoro|zazarathaoro]] || [[word:zazarajaoro|zazarajaoro]] || [[word:zazarashaoro|zazarashaoro]] || [[word:zazarakaoro|zazarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
